evaluation_metadata.scope: Complete change inventory and migration strategy

summary.overview: Upgrade from all-MiniLM-L6-v2 (384-dimensional embeddings) to Nomic-embed-text-v1.5 (768-dimensional, +9.1 MTEB score). The dimension change is currently hardcoded in 11 locations. Migration requires sequential and parallel changes with careful handling of existing vector indices.
summary.impact: Medium complexity. The dimension is used in vector algebra (dot product, pooling), index construction, and caching. Cross-encoder (ms-marco-MiniLM-L-6-v2) is independent and does not require changes unless future upgrade to cross-encoder is planned.
summary.risk_level: Low-medium. No breaking API changes. Backward compatibility requires index versioning or detection mechanism.

vector_index.dimension_in_file_format: Stored in index metadata, must match at load time

cross_encoder.status: INDEPENDENT - does not use embedder dimension, does not need changes

phase_1_preparation.description: Create new model directory structure and download Nomic weights

changes.from: const MODEL_ONNX_URL and others for MiniLM only
changes.to: Add Nomic-embed-text-v1.5 URLs alongside MiniLM URLs
changes.detail: Add: NOMIC_MODEL_URL, NOMIC_MODEL_QUANTIZED_URL, NOMIC_TOKENIZER_URL (from HuggingFace pinned commit)

changes.from: Only MiniLM checksums in ModelChecksums struct
changes.to: Add NOMIC_QUANTIZED_MODEL, NOMIC_FULL_MODEL, NOMIC_TOKENIZER checksums
changes.detail: New const values: NOMIC_QUANTIZED_MODEL, NOMIC_FULL_MODEL, NOMIC_TOKENIZER

changes.to: Add get_nomic_models_dir() returning 'nomic-v1.5'
changes.detail: New function: pub fn get_nomic_models_dir() -> PathBuf

changes.to: Add download_nomic_models() with same pattern
changes.detail: New public fn: download_nomic_models(progress: Option<ProgressCallback>) -> Result<PathBuf>

phase_2_embedder_abstraction.description: Make embedding dimension configurable instead of hardcoded to 384

changes.from: trait Embedder has dimension(&self) -> usize (returns hardcoded 384)
changes.to: dimension() already exists as method - trait is ready for multiple dimensions
changes.detail: No code change needed. Trait already supports dynamic dimension via dimension() method.

changes.from: struct MiniLMEmbedder { dimension: usize } with hardcoded 384 assignment at lines 427, 478
changes.to: Read dimension from config or model introspection during initialization
changes.detail: Add to EmbeddingConfig: pub expected_dimension: Option<usize> (default: Some(384)). In MiniLMEmbedder::new(), validate output shape matches expected_dimension.

changes.from: struct EmbeddingConfig { model_path, tokenizer_path, max_length, use_quantized, embed_timeout_ms }
changes.to: Add expected_dimension field for validation
changes.detail: pub struct EmbeddingConfig { ... pub expected_dimension: Option<usize> }. Update Default::default() and from_env() to set Some(384).

changes.to: dimension: config.expected_dimension.unwrap_or(384)
changes.detail: Both new() and new_simplified() use config-based dimension

phase_3_switch_embedders.description: Create NomicEmbedder struct and add factory for model selection

changes.to: pub mod nomic; (new module)
changes.detail: Create src/embeddings/nomic.rs with NomicEmbedder struct

changes.template: Copy minilm.rs structure, change dimension to 768, update model loading for Nomic weights
changes.detail: New NomicEmbedder struct with same interface as MiniLMEmbedder. Update: model paths, max_length (if different), dimension = 768.

changes.to: pub enum EmbedderModel { MiniLM, Nomic }. pub fn create_embedder(model: EmbedderModel, config: ...) -> Result<Arc<dyn Embedder>>
changes.detail: Factory pattern for selecting embedder. Can be controlled by env var SHODH_EMBEDDER=minilm|nomic (default: minilm for backward compat).

phase_4_vector_index_updates.description: Update Vamana index to support multiple dimensions, add version detection

changes.to: Store dimension in index metadata header for validation at load time
changes.detail: Index file format v2: prepend 4-byte magic + 4-byte version + 4-byte dimension before existing data. On load, validate dimension matches config or embedder.dimension().
changes.backward_compat: v1 indices (no version header) default to dimension=384. Detect by file size.

changes.to: pub dimension: usize (no default - require explicit value from embedder)
changes.detail: Modify VamanaConfig::default() to not hardcode 384. Pass embedder.dimension() when constructing index.

changes.to: VamanaConfig { dimension: embedder.dimension() ... }
changes.detail: Pass embedder.dimension() instead of hardcoded 384

phase_5_memory_system_updates.description: Update MemorySystem to use embedder from central location

changes.to: Use factory: create_embedder(EmbedderModel::from_env(), config)?
changes.detail: Use embeddings::create_embedder() factory (from P3.3) controlled by SHODH_EMBEDDER env var

changes.to: Update comments to mention dimension-dependent size calculation
changes.detail: Change: '~15MB for 384-dim embeddings' to '~15MB per 384-dim entries (scales with dimension)'

phase_6_constants_documentation.description: Update hardcoded dimension references in constants and comments

changes.to: Clarify this is model-specific and dimension varies by embedder
changes.detail: Add comment explaining ENTITY_EMBEDDING_CACHE_MAX uses current embedder dimension, not hardcoded 384

changes.to: // Text: configurable dim (MiniLM 384, Nomic 768)
changes.detail: Update Modality::Text dimension() method to call embedder.dimension() instead of returning 384

changes.to: Modality::Text => get_text_embedder_dimension(), // Dynamic based on SHODH_EMBEDDER
changes.detail: Create helper fn get_text_embedder_dimension() that reads from embedder trait or config

changes.from: //! Uses ONNX Runtime with MiniLM-L6-v2 for 384-dimensional embeddings.
changes.to: //! Uses ONNX Runtime with configurable embedder (MiniLM-L6-v2: 384-dim or Nomic-embed-text-v1.5: 768-dim).

phase_7_tests_and_assertions.description: Update hardcoded dimension assertions in tests

changes.to: assert_eq!(embedding.len(), embedder.dimension());
changes.detail: Change both lines 997 and 1021 to use embedder.dimension() instead of hardcoded 384
Mirror test_encode() and test_encode_batch() from minilm.rs, verifying dimension=768

backward_compatibility.mechanism: Index file versioning with dimension header
steps: Indices created with MiniLM have no version header; on first load with new code, detect as v0 and assume dimension=384
Indices created with Nomic have explicit version header (v1) with dimension embedded
On mismatch, refuse to load with clear error message directing user to re-embed and rebuild index
Provide migration helper: shodh-memory rebuild-index --from-embedder minilm --to-embedder nomic
backward_compatibility.data_loss: None - original memories preserved, only vector indices must be rebuilt
backward_compatibility.rollback: Keep MiniLM model and code path available, revert SHODH_EMBEDDER env var

parallel_safe: P1.1 and P1.2 and P1.3 (all independent additions)
P2.2 and P2.3 (same file, no conflict)

rollout_phases.phase_1_merge: Implement P1 (download support) - no runtime changes yet, fully backward compatible
rollout_phases.phase_2_merge: Implement P2, P3 (abstractions) - add factory pattern but default to MiniLM
rollout_phases.phase_3_merge: Implement P4, P5, P6, P7 - complete infrastructure. SHODH_EMBEDDER=minilm by default
rollout_phases.phase_4_test: Integration testing: create indices with both embedders, verify dimension handling
rollout_phases.phase_5_enable: Set SHODH_EMBEDDER=nomic as default in main branch after full testing
rollout_phases.phase_6_deprecate: In v2.0, mark minilm as deprecated; in v3.0, remove it entirely

make_dimension_configurable.benefit: Future model swaps (e.g., to 1024-dim or other models) require only addition of new embedder, not code refactoring
make_dimension_configurable.implementation: Already done in P2 - EmbeddingConfig::expected_dimension. Dimension flows from embedder.dimension() trait method.
make_dimension_configurable.additional_step: Create EmbedderRegistry<name -> Box<dyn Embedder>> to support multiple registered embedders at runtime

backward_compatibility_mechanism.approach: Index format versioning with dimension detection
benefits: Users can keep existing indices using MiniLM while selectively upgrading to Nomic for new indices
Clear error on dimension mismatch prevents silent embedding corruption
backward_compatibility_mechanism.cost: 4-8 bytes per index file for version header + 1-2 dimension validation checks per index load

cross_encoder_independence.finding: Cross-encoder (ms-marco-MiniLM-L-6-v2) is completely independent from bi-encoder dimension
cross_encoder_independence.implication: No changes required to cross_encoder.rs or cross-encoder download URLs
cross_encoder_independence.future_upgrade_path: When/if cross-encoder is upgraded (e.g., to ms-marco-mDPR), it follows the same pattern as bi-encoder upgrade

unit_tests: Test MiniLMEmbedder with mocked 768-dim output (should accept if configured)
Test dimension() trait method returns correct value for each embedder
Test index file versioning (v0 -> v1 migration detection)
integration_tests: Create MemorySystem with MiniLM, store 100 memories, build index
Switch to Nomic embedder, attempt to load index (should fail with helpful error)
Rebuild index with Nomic embedder, verify search quality
Compare search results: MiniLM index vs Nomic index (expect better recall with Nomic)
Test cache eviction and hit rates with different embedder dimensions
performance_benchmarks: Measure encode() latency: MiniLM vs Nomic (expect Nomic ~10-15% slower due to 2x dimension)
Measure batch_encode() throughput: both embedders with batch size 32
Measure vector search latency: Vamana with 384-dim vs 768-dim (expect ~2x higher)
Measure index file size: MiniLM indices vs Nomic indices (expect ~2x larger)
Measure cache memory usage: both embedders at max capacity

before_merge: Backward compatibility: old MiniLM indices load with clear error and recovery message
Dimension detection: loads index and verifies dimension matches embedder
No embedding corruption: verified via hash of embeddings before/after
before_release: Integration tests pass: full memory lifecycle with both embedders
Search quality: Nomic indices show >= +5 points improvement in retrieval recall
Performance acceptable: Nomic encode latency < 50ms, batch throughput >= 1000 docs/sec
Documentation complete: README, ARCHITECTURE, migration guide
before_default_switch: User feedback: at least 5 test users confirm Nomic improves their workflows
No regressions: cross-encoder reranking still works identically
Migration path tested: users can selectively upgrade indices at their own pace

src/embeddings/mod.rs.context: Doc: Uses ONNX Runtime with MiniLM-L6-v2

priority_1_critical: P1.4 (download support) - enables testing with actual Nomic weights
P2.2-P2.4 (configurable dimension) - foundation for all other changes
P4.1-P4.3 (index versioning) - prevents silent corruption on dimension mismatch
priority_2_important: P3.3 (embedder factory) - enables runtime selection of embedder
P5.1 (use factory) - switches from hardcoded MiniLM to configurable
priority_3_quality: P6 (documentation) - prevents future developers from re-hardcoding
P7 (tests) - ensures correctness with new dimensions
optional_enhancements: Create EmbedderRegistry for registering multiple embedders at runtime
Add CLI tool: shodh-memory embedder switch --from minilm --to nomic
Add metrics: embedding dimension in prometheus output
Add health check: verify embedder dimension matches index dimension at startup

risk_1_dimension_mismatch.description: Querying with wrong dimension embeddings against index creates silent failures or corrupted results
risk_1_dimension_mismatch.mitigation: P4.1 - add version header to index with embedded dimension. Refuse to load on mismatch.

risk_2_cache_invalidation.description: Embedding cache contains 384-dim vectors; switching to Nomic invalidates all cached entries
risk_2_cache_invalidation.mitigation: Caches are bounded LRU; clear on embedder switch. No data loss, just cache miss storm.
risk_2_cache_invalidation.impact: First 1000 queries slower after switch, then back to normal

risk_3_modality_confusion.description: Modality::Text dimension() returns hardcoded 384; confuses multimodal search
risk_3_modality_confusion.mitigation: P6.3 - make Modality::Text dimension dynamic. Add test for multimodal search with Nomic.

risk_4_cross_encoder_mismatch.description: If someone upgrades cross-encoder without understanding independence, might try to sync dimensions
risk_4_cross_encoder_mismatch.mitigation: Document clearly that cross-encoder is independent. Add comment in cross_encoder.rs explaining this.

must_have: Vamana index correctly stores and retrieves with 768-dim vectors
Search recall improves by at least +5% over MiniLM (due to +9.1 MTEB)
No backward compatibility break: MiniLM indices can still be used with old code or migrated with helper
Performance acceptable: encode() latency < 50ms, search latency < 100ms for 10M vectors
should_have: Dimension fully configurable, not hardcoded anywhere in logic
Clear documentation of migration path for users
Ability to run both embedders simultaneously (for A/B testing)
nice_to_have: EmbedderRegistry for future embedders without code changes
Metrics dashboard showing embedder dimension in use
Performance comparison: MiniLM vs Nomic for typical queries
